---
output: html_document
---

```{r, results='asis'}
nice_header("Software I Developed", "Logiciels que j'ai développés", language)
```

## `r if_english("R Packages", "Modules R", language)`

\setlength{\parindent}{0in}
\setlength{\leftskip}{0in}
\footnotesize

```{r software_intro, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(if_english(
  "R packages are modular, open-source tools that extend the functionality of the R programming language—the leading open-source tool for statistical analysis. These packages simplify complex statistical workflows, automate reporting, and promote good research practices.",
  "Les modules R sont des outils modulaires et de logiciel libre qui étendent les fonctionnalités du langage de programmation R, principal outil en logiciel libre d'analyse statistique. Ces modules simplifient les travaux statistiques et favorisent les bonnes pratiques de recherche.",
  language
))
```

```{r easystats_downloads, fig.align="center", eval=FALSE}
# Can't actually run this as replacement for badges because I also have some non-easystats packages!!
x <- easystats_downloads()
x

# x <- format_value(x, big_mark = ",")

# knitr::kable(x,
#     format = "latex",
#     booktabs = TRUE,
#     escape = FALSE,
#     align = "c"
#     ) %>%
#     kableExtra::kable_styling(
#       position = "center", font_size = 9, latex_options = "hold_position")

filtered_x <- x %>% 
  filter(Package %in% c("insight", "performance", "effectsize", "correlation",
                        "see", "modelbased", "report", "easystats")) %>%
  # mutate(Total = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Total)),
  #        Monthly = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Monthly))) %>%
  add_row(Package = "Total",
          Total = sum(.$Total),#prettyNum(.$Total, big.mark = ","),
          Monthly = sum(.$Monthly)) #%>%  #prettyNum(.$Monthly, big.mark = ","))
  # mutate(Total = prettyNum(.$Total, big.mark = ","),
  #        Monthly = prettyNum(.$Monthly, big.mark = ","))
filtered_x

```

```{r software, include = FALSE}
software <- FALSE
```

\setlength{\parindent}{-0.4in}
\setlength{\leftskip}{0.4in}
\setlength{\parskip}{8pt}

```{r create images, include = FALSE, eval = !software}
img_dir <- here::here("img")

# see
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/see", 
         file.path(img_dir, "see_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/see", 
         file.path(img_dir, "see.png"),
         width = 250)

# modelbased
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/modelbased", 
         file.path(img_dir, "modelbased_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/modelbased", 
         file.path(img_dir, "modelbased.png"),
         width = 250)

# performance
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/correlation", 
         file.path(img_dir, "performance_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/performance", 
         file.path(img_dir, "performance.png"),
         width = 250)

# correlation
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/correlation", 
         file.path(img_dir, "correlation_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/correlation", 
         file.path(img_dir, "correlation.png"),
         width = 250)

# easystats
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/easystats", 
         file.path(img_dir, "easystats_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/easystats", 
         file.path(img_dir, "easystats.png"),
         width = 250)

# report
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/report", 
         file.path(img_dir, "report_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/report", 
         file.path(img_dir, "report.png"),
         width = 250)

# effectsize
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/effectsize", 
         file.path(img_dir, "effectsize_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/effectsize", 
         file.path(img_dir, "effectsize.png"),
         width = 250)

# lavaanExtra
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/lavaanExtra", 
         file.path(img_dir, "lavaanExtra_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/lavaanExtra", 
         file.path(img_dir, "lavaanExtra.png"),
         width = 250)

# rempsyc
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/rempsyc", 
         file.path(img_dir, "rempsyc_monthly.png"),
         width = 250)
rsvg_png("https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/rempsyc", 
         file.path(img_dir, "rempsyc.png"),
         width = 250)
```

`r number_prefix(9, count_everything)`Lüdecke, D., Makowski, D., Patil, I., Ben-Shachar, M. S., Wiernik, B. M., & **Thériault, R.** (2025). *see: Model visualisation toolbox for 'easystats' and 'ggplot2'* `r if_english("(R package version 0.11.0.8) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.see `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/see/. `r if_english("Complements numeric summaries from easystats packages with functions to generate publication-ready visualizations of model parameters, predictions, and performance diagnostics.", "Complète les résumés numériques des modules easystats avec des fonctions permettant de générer des visualisations prêtes à être publiées des paramètres du modèle, des prédictions et des diagnostics de performances.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt"}
knitr::include_graphics("img/see_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/see.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(8, count_everything)`Makowski, D., Lüdecke, D., Ben-Shachar, M. S., Patil, I., & **Thériault, R.** (2025). *modelbased: Estimation of model-based predictions, contrasts and means* `r if_english("(R package version 0.9.0.41) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.modelbased `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/modelbased/. `r if_english("Helps researchers extract and visualize model-based predictions, marginal means, and contrasts from complex models such as generalized linear models, mixed models, or Bayesian models.", "Aide les chercheurs à extraire et à visualiser les prédictions basées sur des modèles, les moyennes marginales et les contrastes à partir de modèles complexes tels que les modèles linéaires généralisés, les modèles mixtes ou les modèles bayésiens.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt"}
knitr::include_graphics("img/modelbased_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/modelbased.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(7, count_everything)`Lüdecke, D., Makowski, D., Ben-Shachar, M. S., Patil, I., Waggoner, P., Wiernik, B. M., & **Thériault, R.** (2024). *performance: Assessment of regression models performance* `r if_english("(R package version 0.10.9) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.performance `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/performance/. `r if_english("Offers standardized, user-friendly functions to evaluate goodness-of-fit, residual diagnostics, and model comparison metrics across a variety of regression models.", "Offre des fonctions standardisées et conviviales pour évaluer l'adéquation, les diagnostics résiduels et les mesures de comparaison de modèles sur une variété de modèles de régression.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt"}
knitr::include_graphics("img/performance_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/performance.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(6, count_everything)`Makowski, D., Wiernik, B. M., Patil, I., Lüdecke, D., & Ben-Shachar, M. S., & **Thériault, R.** (2023). *correlation: Methods for correlation analysis* `r if_english("(R package version 0.8.4) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.correlation `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/correlation/. `r if_english("Simplifies correlation analysis by offering user-friendly functions for computing, visualizing, and reporting various types of correlations, including partial, robust, and Bayesian correlations.", "Simplifie l'analyse de corrélation en offrant des fonctions conviviales pour le calcul, la visualisation et la création de rapports sur divers types de corrélations, notamment les corrélations partielles, robustes et bayésiennes.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt"}
knitr::include_graphics("img/correlation_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/correlation.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(5, count_everything)`Lüdecke, D., Makowski, D., Ben-Shachar, M. S., Patil, I., Wiernik, B. M., Bacher, E., & **Thériault, R.** (2023). *easystats: An R framework for easy statistical modeling, visualization, and reporting* `r if_english("(R package version 0.6.1) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.easystats `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/easystats. `r if_english("Serves as a wrapper for the easystats ecosystem, providing an integrated and consistent interface for statistical modeling, effect sizes, visualizations, and standardized reporting.", "Sert d'enveloppe pour l'écosystème easystats, fournissant une interface intégrée et cohérente pour la modélisation statistique, les tailles d'effet, les visualisations et les rapports standardisés.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt", eval = !software}
knitr::include_graphics("img/easystats_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/easystats.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(4, count_everything)`Makowski, D., Lüdecke, D., Patil, I, **Thériault, R.**, Ben-Shachar, M. S., & Wiernik, B. M. (2022). *report: From R to your manuscript* `r if_english("(R package version 0.5.6) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.report `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/report. `r if_english("Automatically generates APA-style summaries and statistical descriptions from models and tests, streamlining manuscript preparation and reproducible reporting.", "Génère automatiquement des résumés de style APA et des descriptions statistiques à partir de modèles et de tests, simplifiant ainsi la préparation des manuscrits et la création de rapports reproductibles.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt", eval = !software}
knitr::include_graphics("img/report_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/report.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(3, count_everything)`Ben-Shachar, M. S., Makowski, D., Lüdecke, D., Patil, I., Wiernik, B. M., & **Thériault, R.** (2022). *effectsize: Indices of effect size* `r if_english("(R package version 0.8.2) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.effectsize `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://easystats.github.io/effectsize. `r if_english("Calculates and interprets a wide range of standardized effect sizes (e.g., Cohen's *d*, eta-squared) for regression, ANOVA, and non-parametric tests.", "Calcule et interprète une large gamme de tailles d'effet standardisées (par exemple, *d* de Cohen, eta-carré) pour les tests de régression, ANOVA et non paramétriques.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt", eval = !software}
knitr::include_graphics("img/effectsize_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/effectsize.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(2, count_everything)`**Thériault, R.** (2022). *lavaanExtra: Convenience functions for lavaan* `r if_english("(R package version 0.1.0) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.lavaanExtra `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://lavaanExtra.remi-theriault.com/. `r if_english("Extends the capabilities of the *lavaan* package for structural equation modeling by providing automated APA-style table output and more customizable path diagrams.", "Étend les capacités du package *lavaan* pour la modélisation d'équations structurelles en fournissant une sortie de tableau automatisée de style APA et des diagrammes de chemin plus personnalisables.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt", eval = !software}
knitr::include_graphics("img/lavaanExtra_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/lavaanExtra.png", dpi = NA)
```

`r number_prefix(1, count_everything)`**Thériault, R.** (2022). *rempsyc: Convenience functions for psychology* `r if_english("(R package version 0.0.7) [Computer software]", "(module R) [Logiciel]", language)`. https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.rempsyc `r if_english("and", "et", language)` https://rempsyc.remi-theriault.com. `r if_english("Offers convenience functions tailored to psychological researchers, simplifying common tasks such as statistical tests, assumptions checks, and APA-style visualizations and tables.", "Offre des fonctions pratiques adaptées aux chercheurs en psychologie, simplifiant les tâches courantes telles que les tests statistiques, les vérifications d'hypothèses et les visualisations et tableaux de style APA.", language)`

```{r, out.height="12pt", eval = !software}
knitr::include_graphics("img/rempsyc_monthly.png", dpi = NA)
knitr::include_graphics("img/rempsyc.png", dpi = NA)
```

## `r if_english("Visualization Dashboard", "Tableau de bord de visualisation", language)`

\setlength{\parindent}{0in}
\setlength{\leftskip}{0in}

```{r dashboard_intro, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(if_english(
  "This dashboard draws on data from nearly 60 journals and over 100,000 articles to highlight and track the under-representation of Global South authors in behavioral science to empower institutions, journals, and researchers to benchmark and improve their equity efforts.",
  "Ce tableau de bord s'appuie sur les données de près de 60 revues et de plus de 100 000 articles pour mettre en évidence et suivre la sous-représentation des auteur-es du Sud global dans les sciences du comportement afin d'évaluer et d'améliorer les efforts en matière d'équité.",
  language
))
```

\setlength{\parindent}{-0.4in}
\setlength{\leftskip}{0.4in}
\setlength{\parskip}{8pt}

**Thériault, R.**, & Forscher, P. (2024). The Missing Majority in Behavioral Science Dashboard. https://remi-theriault.com/dashboards/missing_majority
